programme.title: Kurt Rosenwinkel, Tim Motzer & Gintas Janusonis
programme.desc: Jazzfest Bonn is an annual festival of modern and creative jazz music. Every May it presents local and international jazz musicians in concert halls all over the German city. Among the artists of the 2017 edition is Bandit 65, a trio of breathtaking virtuosity, great power, boundless breadth, and astounding beauty. Together with Tim Motzer on guitar and electronics, and Gintas Janusonis on drums and percussion, guitarist and band leader Kurt Rosenwinkel explores the intersection of guitars, rhythm, electronics, soundscapes, free improvisation, and telepathic interplay.

programme.title: Thelonious Monk
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Oscar Peterson Trio, Stuff Smith & Ella Fitzgerald
programme.sub-title: O.P. Trio and E. Fitz. - Jazz At The Philharmonic
programme.desc: The Royal Concertgebouw in Amsterdam is a world-renowned concert hall, known for its first-rate acoustics. It has attracted many famous performers over the years and is one of the Netherlands' most treasured musical institutions. On May 5, 1957, jazz impresario Norman Granz presented his Jazz at the Philharmonic tour at the Concertgebouw in Amsterdam. The Canadian pianist Oscar Peterson and his trio of guitarist Herb Ellis and bassist Ray Brown are later joined by trumpeter Roy Eldridge and drummer Jo Jones. As an added attraction, American violinist Stuff Smith joins the proceedings. American singer Ella Fitzgerald, accompanied by pianist Don Abney, Ellis, Brown and Jones, hits her vocal peak in a stunning set that culminates in a jam session of It Don't Mean A Thing (If It Ain't Got That Swing) with the entire ensemble.

programme.title: Charlie Galbraith
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Salif Keita, Souleymane Dournbia, Lansine Kouyate & N'Doumbé
programme.desc: Salif Keita's music is a rich combination of traditional Malian music with European and American influences. We can hear this in the instrumentation of Keita's music, which varies from traditional West-African instruments to Western European ones. The Malian singer was cast out by his family because of his albinism. In 1967 he moved to Bamako, where he started his musical career and joined Les Ambassadeurs (Internationaux). He achieved international acknowledgement with this band in the 1970s. After spending a couple of years in Ivory Coast, Salif has found his home base in Paris since 1984. During this 2010 concert, he proves to be rightfully referred to as “The Golden Voice of Africa”.

programme.title: Wayne Shorter
programme.sub-title: Wayne Shorter Quintet - Estival Jazz Lugano
programme.desc: Estival Jazz Lugano is an annual, open-air music festival that takes place over five days in the picturesque city of Lugano, Switzerland. Since 1979, this musical Mecca has been a must-attend event for all jazz and world music fans worldwide. In July 1996, renowned American saxophonist Wayne Shorter and his quintet performed at Estival Jazz Lugano. Together with pianist Jim Beard, guitarist David Gilmore, bassist Alphonso Johnson, and drummer Rodney van Holmes, Shorter shows he is still at his best.

programme.title: John Coltrane
programme.desc: Explore the music of one of the most influential and innovative saxophonists in jazz history: John Coltrane! Immerse yourself in this collection of remarkable performances from the early 1960s that showcase Coltrane's unparalleled artistry and unique sound during a transformative period in the artist's career. Recorded in various European cities, Coltrane is seen playing the songs “Autumn Leaves”, “Hackensack”, “My Favorite Things”, “I Want To Talk About You”, “Vigil”, and “Naima”. Tune in and experience why the music of John Coltrane has touched the lives of so many!

programme.title: Jon Hendricks, Judith Hendricks, Kim Lindsay & Mart Ledford
programme.desc: Since 1977, Estival is a summer jazz festival in Switzerland, Lugano. Estival offers a thrilling and particularly surprising line-up that explores the rich world of contemporary music whilst promoting the understanding of different cultures, tolerance, and co-existence. John Carl Hendricks is one of the instigators of "vocalese", an art form that aims to add lyrics to existing instrumental pieces and replace several instruments with singing. He flaunts this technique at Estival, where he "scat" while playing double bass. Hendricks is known for his mastery of scat, a form of vocal jazz that uses onomatopoeia rather than lyrics

programme.title: Ivan Fischer, Budapest Festival Orchestra & Richard Goode
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Symphonies and Piano Concerto No. 4
programme.desc: Iván Fischer leads his Budapest Festival Orchestra (BFO) in a concert program dedicated to the music of Ludwig van Beethoven. The program opens with the composer's Symphony No. 1 in C major, Op. 21. Afterward, Fischer conducts Beethoven's Piano Concerto No. 4 in G major, Op. 58, in which Richard Goode features as the soloist. The acclaimed American pianist (1943) is known for his interpretations of the Beethoven repertoire. Goode recorded all five Beethoven piano concertos with the BFO and Fischer, earning him exceptional critical acclaim and a Grammy Award nomination. As an encore, Goode performs the Sarabande from J. S. Bach's Partita in B-flat major, BWV 825. The program closes with Beethoven's famous Symphony No. 5 in C minor, Op. 67. This performance was recorded at the Béla Bartók National Concert Hall in Budapest, Hungary, on January 29, 2017.

programme.title: Les Dissonances
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Mademoiselle Karen, Jakob Munch, Danish National Symphony Orchestra & Emma Smith
programme.desc: One night only! Welcome to the spectacular and decadent world of The Babylon Hotel, where music pours out of every crevice like bubbling champagne. In this concert, the upper class meets the underworld in a melting pot of euphoria and extravagance, nostalgia and pleasure with a carefree sinfulness only seen in the exuberant nightlife of the 1920s around the world. The concert features iconic music from movies and series, such as The Great Gatsby, Burlesque, and Babylon Berlin. The music is performed by the Danish National Symphony Orchestra and DR Big Band under the direction of Miho Hazama. The concert also features the Moka Efti Orchestra, and singers Madame le Pustra, Emma Smith, Mademoiselle Karen, Jakob Munch, and Nikko Weidemann, as well as dancers of Sweet Burlesque. This performance was recorded at the DR Koncerthuset in Copenhagen, Denmark, in May 2023.

programme.title: Ludwig Wicki, Danish National Symphony Orchestra, DR Junior Choir & Andrea Lykke Oehlenschlæger
programme.desc: Swiss conductor Ludwig Wicki leads the Danish National Symphony Orchestra and the DR Junior Choir in a sparkling concert program of film music. The program features a selection of music from great and Oscar-winning Hollywood films, including Titanic, The Bodyguard, Pirates of the Caribbean, Braveheart, and Moulin Rouge, written by major composers such as John Williams, Hans Zimmer, James Horner, and Klaus Badelt. Highlights include ‘He's a pirate/Davy Jones' from Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Man's Chest ‘Now We Are Free' from Gladiator ‘My Heart Will Go On' from Titanic and ‘Shallow' from A Star Is Born. Featured soloists in this concert are the young talented singers Andrea Lykke Oehlenschlæger and Diluckshan Jeyaratnam. This performance was recorded at the DR Koncerthuset in Copenhagen, Denmark, in May 2022.

programme.title: Pavel Milyukov & Boris Berezovsky
programme.sub-title: Works for violin by Franck, Fauré, Schubert a.o.
programme.desc: Russian violinist Pavel Milyukov and pianist Boris Berezovsky join forces in this concert recorded at Tchaikovsky Concert Hall in Moscow, Russia, on October 15, 2020. Milyukov has won prizes at various international competitions and has appeared at venues throughout Europe. He forms an excellent chamber music duo with acclaimed pianist Boris Berezovsky. On this concert's program are César Franck's Sonata for violin and piano Gabriel Fauré's Après un rêve Alfred Schnittke's Stille Nacht and Franz Schubert's Erlkönig. As an encore, the duo performs ‘Russian Song' from Igor Stravinsky's opera Mavra (arranged by S. Dushkin).

programme.title: Aretha Franklin
programme.desc: After a period at Columbia Records, Franklin signed to Atlantic Records in 1967, where she achieved her commercial acclaim and success with songs such as "Respect", "(You Make Me Feel Like) A Natural Woman", "Spanish Harlem" and "Think". By the end of the 1960s Franklin's chart dominance soon earned her the title Queen of Soul, while at the same time she also became a symbol of black empowerment during the Civil Rights Movement.

programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts

programme.title: Nirvana
programme.desc: Very few bands have had a musical and social impact on the world however, in its short but monumental career Nirvana certainly did both. This film features powerful footage of the band in action, both in concert and in the studio. In addition, we a team of leading music critics and insiders including Miti Adhikari, the producer of 1991's historic BBC sessions, and Kurt Cobain's biographer Charles R. Cross. Features highlights from: Smells Like Teen Spirit, Heart Shaped Box, Rape Me, Sliver, Negative Creep, Pennyroyal Tea and more...

programme.title: Florence + the Machine
programme.desc: The Apple Music Festival (formerly known as the iTunes Festival) was a music concert series held by Apple, Inc. inaugurated in 2007.

programme.title: Lana Del Rey
programme.desc: Born to Die is the second album by singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, and the first to be officially released on January 27, 2012 and that would lead to global success In countries such as the United Kingdom the album was the best selling of that year, that recognition made her a guest of honor in one of the most popular London festivals iTunes Festival, where she would open the awe of all attendees on the night of September 25 2012 at the Roundhouse in the city of London.

programme.title: Black Eyed Peas
programme.desc: BLACK EYED PEAS are American hip hop group, consisting of rappers will.i.am, apl.de.ap, Taboo, and singer Fergie. Originally an alternative hip hop group, they subsequently added R&B and EDM influences. Although the group was founded in Los Angeles in 1995, it was not until the release of their third album Elephunk in 2003 that they achieved high record sales. Since that time, the group has sold an estimated 76 million records (35 million albums and 41 million singles), making them one of the world's best-selling groups of all time. Using interviews, news archive and performance this episode reveals the unique aspect of this iconic band.

programme.title: Navidad encantada
programme.desc: La diseñadora de interiores Laura es enviada a su ciudad natal de Sante Fe, Nuevo México, para remodelar un hotel emblemático a tiempo para un espectáculo de baile de la Nochebuena. Mientras Laura se involucra en las renovaciones, descubre que un antiguo amor es la estrella del evento de caridad.

programme.title: Navidad en Honeysuckle Lane
programme.desc: Tras no haber vuelto en años, desde que murió su madre, Emma regresa a su localidad natal para pasar la Navidad con sus hermanos. Una vez allá, los recuerdos y la alegría de los reencuentros se adueña del ambiente.

programme.title: Amar para siempre
programme.desc: Lucy debe luchar para impedir que su amor de la infancia tire abajo una hacienda para construir un campo de golf. Mientras buscan un punto medio, descubren que el pasado podría ser la clave para proteger el futuro.

programme.title: Siempre serás tú
programme.desc: Los planes de compromiso de una mujer se arruinan cuando el hermano de espíritu libre de su prometido regresa a casa.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Glenn encuentra a Enid y la convence de regresar junto a él a Alexandria. Mientras, en la comunidad, Ron roba armas del arsenal y Carol se enfrenta a Morgan porque no confía en él.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La horda de zombis invade Alexandria a través de la grieta que se produjo en el muro. Rick, Michonne, Carl, Gabriel y Deanna se ocultan en la casa de Jessie, pero se dan cuenta de que están rodeados.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Ahora que los caminantes han traspasado las barreras de Alexandría, Rick y los otros sobrevivientes deben seguir luchando para mantenerse a salvo e intentar no perder la esperanza.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo cree que estar en el lado de los vivos trae responsabilidades que van más allá de la supervivencia. Desde esta perspectiva, Rick comienza una lucha consigo mismo para preservar las huellas de lo que queda de humanidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de Rick acompaña a Jesus a su comunidad, La Cumbre. Allí, un residente intenta matar a Gregory, el líder, por órdenes de Negan. Maggie hace un pacto con Gregory: matarán a Negan a cambio de la mitad de las provisiones que guardan.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Un nuevo enemigo amenaza la paz en Alexandria y Rick y el grupo deciden que la única manera de vencerlo es combatir.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tras haber obtenido un éxito menor, algunos de los miembros del grupo han sido hechos prisioneros por sus nuevos enemigos y el resto de los supervivientes de Alexandria tendrá que tratar de liberarlos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Abraham abandona a Eugene durante una misión porque él le dice que no necesita su protección. Daryl, Rosita y Denise se topan con un grupo de los Salvadores, dirigidos por Dwight, y entre los dos bandos se produce un tiroteo.

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II
programme.desc: La exploración del túnel se pone en pausa tras un descubrimiento explosivo. Mientras tanto, otra pista alentadora en la Grieta 6 hace que Rick crea que van por buen camino.

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II
programme.desc: A falta de opciones, John planea perforar la montaña para ir bajo la cascada sin embargo, el clima dificulta mucho las cosas. Mientras tanto, Rick halla un artículo en la Grieta 6 que podría probar la presencia de los japoneses.

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II
programme.desc: Mientras que John y Rick trabajan juntos para descifrar un mapa del Lirio Dorado, la Grieta 6 revela su primera pieza del tesoro. Mientras tanto, a Levi y a Geo se les ocurre una solución creativa para atravesar un derrumbe misterioso en el túnel.

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II
programme.desc: Conforme el equipo llega al fondo de la Grieta 6, nuevas y sorprendentes pruebas indican que podrían haber llegado demasiado tarde. Mientras tanto, los mineros desencadenan un peligro en el túnel que los pone en riesgo.

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II
programme.desc: Cuando un callejón sin salida amenaza acabar con la exploración, se abre una nueva oportunidad. Utilizando su mapa del Lirio Dorado recién descifrado, el equipo descubre nuevos puntos de acceso, con la esperanza de acceder al interior de la cascada.

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II
programme.desc: En la final de la temporada, el equipo por fin llega al espacio vacío bajo la cascada, desde donde pueden vislumbrar qué hay más adentro. Sin embargo, la emoción es interrumpida por unos visitantes inesperados que se interponen en su camino.

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II
programme.desc: La exploración del túnel se pone en pausa tras un descubrimiento explosivo. Mientras tanto, otra pista alentadora en la Grieta 6 hace que Rick crea que van por buen camino.

programme.desc: Ahora que Eliza conoce toda la verdad, Sofía quiere que luche junto a ella para recuperar a Alondra. Ernesto encuentra a su hija.

programme.title: Sin senos sí hay paraíso
programme.desc: El Gato Gordo hace una fiesta de bienvenida para Catalina, canta y baila con ella. Le ofrece casa, viajes y joya sin embargo, antes de ir a la cama pide el doble de lo acordado inicialmente.

programme.title: Sin senos sí hay paraíso
programme.sub-title: Catalina se salva en la raya
programme.desc: El ataque a la mansión de Gato Gordo fracasa en el rescate a Daniela, pero resulta oportuno para Catalina. Nachito, enmascarado, ve al amor de su vida, muy sexy, pero ella no lo reconoce.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Mal heridos, Berta y el Indio abandonan el lugar, no sin antes prometer que harán caer a Sara. Javier se lanza a capturar a Dóriga cuando lo oye en la redada. Begoña pierde las esperanzas.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: A Miriam se le parte el corazón cuando Álvaro ataca y mata al hombre más importante de su vida. Pepito se venga de los pistoleros. Sara estalla cuando Manuel cuestiona el rescate de Dóriga.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Los policías corruptos quieren demostrar su lealtad a Nacho para entrar al negocio de la droga, así que siguen su orden de atacar a la Madrina. Se desata el escándalo entre Nacho e Isabel.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Isabel, sola y deprimida, invita a su ex, Kyle, a La Juerga. Cuando Nacho los ve bailar juntos se vuelve loco y saca un arma. Un soplón informa a la Madrina dónde está su hijo.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos: Atracción
programme.desc: Victoria y Danilo se besan, y ella no sospecha que se está enamorando de Aurelio Casillas. Ambos confiesan sentirse atraídos el uno por el otro. Mónica confirma su embarazo.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Fernanda acepta que está enamorada de Perico. Jonathan y Leonardo son víctimas de una explosión. Ignacio encuentra la foto de Leonardo con otra mujer. Una enfermera llama a Inés y le dice que tiene noticias sobre Jonathan.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Jonathan está en cuidados intensivos, pero Elmer se mete a su habitación para terminar el trabajo. Ignacio llega a la dirección donde fue tomada la foto de Leonardo con una mujer y habla con Trencha. Antes de irse, reconoce a Paloma.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Ignacio se acerca a Paloma, pero Cachito le pregunta su nombre y él miente. Ignacio le pagará a Elmer para que le dé información sobre Paloma. El Chamoy y su hijo se enfrentan. Leonardo le pide a Paloma que se case con él.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Paloma acepta casarse con Leonardo, pero le pide que esperen para dar la noticia. Pedro recibe a Fernanda con una sorpresa y amanecen juntos. Sara le pide a Inés que le permita a Elmer quedarse en la casa, pero Leonardo se opone.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Nora le insinúa a Fabiola que ella le esconde algo a Humberto, y le cuenta a Pedro lo que escuchó sobre Fabiola e Ignacio. Trencha le cuenta a Basilio que Jonathan ha muerto. Inés habla con Leonardo sobre darle una oportunidad a Elmer.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Leonardo le cuenta a su familia que están investigando a Elmer, y le dice a su hermana que lo vio en la clínica el día que Jonathan murió. Fernanda se entera de que Santiago quedó en libertad. El Chamoy entra en la empresa Fuentemayor.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Basilio trata de convencer a Pedro de no decir la verdad por ahora. Ignacio le dice a Fernanda que fueron sus abogados quienes sacaron a Santiago de la cárcel. Elmer entra en la oficina de Leonardo tratando de encontrar documentos.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Elmer se encuentra con Pedro y le dice que le pregunte a su padre por Martín Andrade. Fernanda los ve juntos y se lo cuenta a Ignacio, quien le muestra unos documentos que tienen que ver con la liberación de Elmer.

programme.title: Encuentros con pulpos
programme.desc: El pulpo es lo más parecido a un alienígena que hemos visto en la Tierra. Viajemos al Oceáno Pacífico para conocer más acerca de ellos.

programme.title: Las superbabosas marinas
programme.desc: Los invertebrados más coloridos del océano, los nudibraquios o babosas de mar, se adaptan increíblemente para sobrevivir en el océano.

programme.title: El renacimiento del bosque subacuático
programme.desc: Los bosques de algas marinas ayudan a albergar mayor variedad y diversidad de plantas y animales que casi cualquier otra comunidad marina.

programme.title: La ciencia de la ternura
programme.desc: La domesticación transformó a los lobos en perros. Nuevos hallazgos muestran que los perros levantan las cejas más que los lobos. ¿Por qué?

programme.title: Antártida: ciencia bajo cero
programme.desc: La Antártida es misteriosa e inexplorada. Científicos del Instituto Antártico Chileno estudian el cambio climático en condiciones extremas.

programme.title: El Amazonas incendiado
programme.desc: Más de 60,000 incendios azotaron el Amazonas en 2019. ¿Qué los causó? ¿Cómo afectarán la crisis climática? ¿Se recuperará el Amazonas?

programme.title: El rescate de un osezno
programme.desc: Casey Anderson se enfrentó con la decisión de dejar que un osezno pardo huérfano muera en la naturaleza o salvarlo.

programme.title: Escuela para ballenas
programme.desc: Sigue a una familia de cachalotes en el corazón del Océano Índico. Daremos a conocer al depredador dentado más grande de la Tierra.

programme.title: Chungungo: la nutria más pequeña del mundo

programme.title: Explosión de vida
programme.desc: Desde flores salvajes hasta grandes colonias de medusas en Monterrey e increíbles olas que brillan en la oscuridad, esto es California.

programme.title: El mundo submarino secreto
programme.desc: Embárcate en un viaje con el afamado fotógrafo submarino Peter Kragh, mientras explora la costa de California.

programme.title: Cinco submarinos contra los nazis
programme.desc: Los submarinos de las Fuerzas Navales de Francia exploraron el Atántico para neutralizar a la marina nazi de la Segunda Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: Invasión de hormigas rojas
programme.desc: Sé testigo de como las hormigas rojas representan un gran peligro para la humanidad, lo que provoca pánico en quienes se cruzan en su camino

programme.title: Bahía de cocodrilos
programme.desc: El cocodrilo cubano es una especie en peligro de extinción a punto de desaparecer. Conoce a las personas que intentan salvarlo.

programme.title: The Eagles: Breaking the Band

programme.title: Journey: A Voice Lost... and Found
programme.desc: Journey dominated the American music scene in the seventies and eighties with their epic arena rock anthems and power ballads. Frontman Steve Perry was dubbed The Voice thanks to the untouchable vocal stylings that burned up the radio waves and made him a household name. But the bigger Journey got, the more miserable Perry grew. He was the rare rock superstar who craved anonymity more than applause. Then at the height of the band's success, Perry did the completely unthinkable-he quit Journey. That should've been an absolute death knell for a band so defined by a single voice. But Journey's other longtime members refused to give up the dream and brought in a new singer to keep the music going. Fans were livid that anyone would dare to try to fill Steve Perry's shoes-shows were played in empty houses and threats were even made against the band.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia: Saigon Noodles for Breakfast

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: In the ultimate survival experiment, Bear Grylls abandons 14 British men on a remote desert island in the Pacific with just the clothes they stand up in and a few basic tools. They will be completely alone, filming everything themselves. This time the survival challenge will be harder and longer than before, as they attempt to survive entirely on their own wits for six weeks in the height of the tropical storm season. From the very beginning the men face a life and death struggle, as the fierce currents of the Pacific Ocean force Bear to drop them 75 meters off the island. The men have no choice but to jump ship and make a desperate swim through the violent swells onto a treacherous, rocky coastline.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Bear Grylls abandons 14 ordinary British women on a remote, uninhabited pacific island, left with just the clothes they stand up in and a few basic tools. They're given no food and just a day's supply of drinking water. Like their counterparts on the male island, these women will be utterly alone for six weeks, left to film everything themselves. So when stripped of the luxuries and conveniences of 21stcentury living will these women have the skills and mental strength to survive and rival the male islanders?

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: In the ultimate survival experiment, Bear Grylls has abandoned 14 British men on a remote desert island in the pacific with just the clothes they stand up in and a few basic tools. This time the survival challenge is harder than before, as they attempt to survive entirely on their own wits for six weeks in the height of the tropical storm season. In this film mild mannered paramedic, Barney Strange, comes to the rescue of the group by catching and feeding the men a tasty but unusual supper. Just five days in and the group has reached breaking point. The island has been battered by a series of torrential storms, and without a decent shelter the men have barely slept. They haven't had a decent meal since they arrived, and a bitter rivalry between the island's two builders, Paul and Andy has turned into all out war. Along with the youngest member, Joe, they are now both hell bent on leaving the island, much to the despair of the others.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: In the ultimate survival experiment, Bear Grylls has abandoned 14 British women on a remote desert island in the pacific with just the clothes they stand up in and a few basic tools. This time the survival challenge is harder than before, as they attempt to survive entirely on their own wits for six weeks in the height of the tropical storm season. The women are desperately dehydrated and separated, after an expedition party crossed the island to find a permanent camp - and got hopelessly lost while returning to the others.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: In the ultimate survival experiment, Bear Grylls has abandoned 14 British men on a remote desert island in the Pacific with just the clothes they stand up in and a few basic tools. This time the survival challenge is harder than ever before, as they attempt to survive entirely on their own wits for six weeks in the height of the tropical storm season. In this episode the men face a life and death struggle with the island's most fearsome predator.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: It's Lauren's 25th birthday but there's little to celebrate. Two castaways have already abandoned the women's island due to the extreme conditions, since being dropped in the Pacific seven days ago. The 12 remaining are desperately dehydrated. The survival mantra goes: You can survive 3 minutes without air, 3 days without water and 3 weeks without food, so finding something to drink is these women's number one priority.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: In the ultimate survival experiment, Bear Grylls has abandoned 14 British men on a remote desert island in the Pacific with just the clothes they stand up in and a few basic tools. This time the survival challenge is harder than ever, as they attempt to survive entirely on their own wits for six weeks in the height of the tropical storm season. It's four days since then men trapped and killed a crocodile, and they haven't been able to repeat their success. Most of the meager meals they are eating are coming from cleaning facilities manager, Vic, who has is the only member of the group to mastered his improvised fishing rod.

programme.title: Broken Bones and Broken Phones

Next, an unemployed stock broker gets a rude awakening when Lou and Lyndah wake him up inside his car. And finally, Froy learns why you should never text and not drive to pick up Sonia, because she breaks his phone in two.

programme.title: The Hearse Isn't Empty?
programme.desc: Matt and Lou find themselves in an upscale neighborhood, facing off with a distraught accountant and his belligerent, kick-happy son. Then, Sonia and Froy crash a pool party where the guests were happy to give up their clothes, but they're not willing to give up their car. Finally, Matt and Lou encounter a hearse that they've been tracking for weeks, but before they're able to hook it up, they've got to figure out what's in the back

programme.title: Froy Gets Beat Up
programme.desc: Sonia and Lou see the signs of the bad economy first-hand when a rich couple willing give up their late-model Landcruiser. Then, Matt and Sonia need to contend with a spoiled princess whose daddy forgot to pay the bill on her Jetta.

programme.title: This Is No Fantasy
programme.desc: First, Froy and Lyndah get a tip from a spotter that leads them to a late model sedan with cans tied to the bumper and an angry bride in the passenger side. Next, Matt has to step in when Froy starts to lose it with a group of fantasy football players. And finally, Sonia, Lyndah, Froy, and Lou are astounded when a loopy debtor douses his own car in gasoline and sends it up in flames.

programme.title: The Missing RV and the Private Jet
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy track down an RV that has been missing for 30 years, only to find that its owner is using it to cart around a group of impetuous young Canadian rock stars.

programme.title: Pyramid Scams and Princesses
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Matt wrangle with two belligerent truckers who will stop at nothing to protect their massive tractor-trailer. Next, a young girl learns that she's been a victim of a pyramid scam when Lyndah and Lou come for her car. Finally, Matt, Sonia, and Lyndah enjoy a little nightlife when they hit the club to take down an entitled princess who's high on charm, but late on her payments. But the debtor's not the only one who fights to get the car.

programme.title: Jet Skis and Massages
programme.desc: First, the team heads to the beach to grab a little sun as well as two luxury jet skis. Then, Lou and Froy get in touch with their sensitive side when they confront a massage therapist who's as skilled with her hands as she is with her feet. And finally, Lou and Sonia are unknowingly hired to pull a prank on a debtor, which could cost everyone.

programme.title: Get That Prowler
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client? Then, Matt and Froy attempt to repo a DeLorean from a debtor whose car isn't all that's stuck in the 80's. Finally, Lou and Sonia square off against an overgrown child who isn't giving up his Plymouth Prowler without a tussle.

programme.title: Up Up and Away
programme.desc: First, it's up, up, and away, for Lou, Froy, and Matt. All of their skills are tested when they attempt to take down not one, but two hot air balloons. Then, Lou and Froy find themselves in the wrong part of town, repo'ing a sports car from a former gang member who's not afraid to go back to jail. Finally, Lou and Lyndah break in Frankie, the new guy, with a repo that turns into a confrontation with three spray-paint-packing graffiti girls.

programme.title: Lombok Beaches: Indonesia
programme.desc: Experience the beautiful beaches of an Indonesian island set to a peaceful soundtrack.

programme.title: Turtle Paradise 2
programme.desc: Leave your worries from the world above behind and dive into a vibrant undersea world inhabited by the iconic sea turtles, for 2 full hours of Nature Relaxation. Captured by filmmaker collaborators Tilo & Yvonne Kühnast, Turtle Paradise features hundreds of unique real-time video scenes captured from around the Caribbean, paired with gentle underwater sounds & calming music for deep relaxation by Jason Stephenson.

programme.title: Diamond Beach I: Indonesia
programme.desc: Upgrade your staycation by immersing yourself in the beauty of turquoise waters and a majestic rocky coastline.

programme.title: Glistening Island Beach
programme.desc: An instant classic and perfect scene for mental escape, "Glistening Island Beach" places viewers underneath a big beautiful palm tree facing a perfect white sandy beach, glistening blue sea, sunshine, and the small boat you arrived in. Filmed in 4K Ultra High Definition on the hidden [and now privately owned] exotic island of Nanuku, where a small atoll is surrounded by an untouched perfect lagoon, miles away from it all....

programme.title: Shades Of Color
programme.desc: Shades Of Color S1E9: Shades of Teal — Step into a world of calm serenity where each piece expertly utilizes the soothing shade of teal to evoke a sense of tranquility & relaxation. From serene oceanscapes to abstract compositions, be transported & unwind in a realm of peace and harmony.

programme.title: Shades Of Color
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E10: Shades Of Black — Explore the allure of darkness where black reigns supreme in a mesmerizing artistic journey that unveils the profound depth of the human experience and soft house meets beats with a dark dreamy edge.

programme.title: Halloween Party
programme.desc: Halloween Party S1E1 — Bold colors and haunting melodies bring out the magic of Halloween, inviting viewers to revel in the merriment of the holiday. From grinning skulls to moonlit scenes, the collection enchants with its lighthearted take on spooky.

programme.title: Spring Rites
programme.desc: Spring: Spring Rites E1 — Celebrate spring with a unique motion artwork by Rado Rossum, capturing the season's vibrant renewal. Through dynamic visuals and fluid movement, Rossum evokes the blossoming energy of nature, inviting viewers into a refreshing, dreamlike celebration of growth and rebirth.

programme.title: Seasonal Reflections: Spring Forward II
programme.desc: Seasonal Reflections: Spring Forward E2 — Experience the joy of spring! Bursting with vibrant hues and whimsical strokes, each piece embodies the spirit of new beginnings. Let the colors and creativity transport you to a world of fresh perspectives and blooming possibilities.

programme.title: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Fashion Edge E1 — Step into a realm of electrifying fashion and avant-garde creativity with this high-energy collection. Unleashing the boundless imagination with cutting-edge art that redefines fashion's limits and leaves an indelible mark on the world of style.

programme.title: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Fashion Edge E2 — A dynamic showcase of cutting-edge pieces that redefine fashion's limits. From bold, innovative patterns to daring silhouettes, be captivated by an explosion of colors and concepts that ignite the senses.
